div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: transparent; overflow: visible; position: relative; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
position: absolute; width: 550px; height: 550px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); filter: blur(70px); border-radius: 50%;

div.p: A passionate Full-Stack Software Developer & IT Consultant. I specialize in building robust B2B SaaS platforms, integrating cutting-edge Generative AI APIs, and engineering seamless digital experiences. With a strong foundation in both technical infrastructure and creative problem-solving, I thrive on turning complex challenges into scalable, elegant solutions.

Bachelor's in Management Information Systems (MIS)
Anadolu University (2026)

Associate's in Computer Programming
Dicle University (2021)

High School Diploma in IT & Web Development
İbn-i Sina Anatolian Technical High School (2017)

h4.style: color: #1a1a2e; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0; font-weight: 600;

div.p: IT Consultant & Full-Stack Developer. Built B2B SaaS platforms, managed agency IT infrastructure, and developed automated server backups.

h4.style: color: #1a1a2e; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 0.3rem 0; font-weight: 600;

div.p: IT Field Support Specialist. Handled on-site crisis management, network deployment, and motherboard-level hardware repairs.
